data.title: Report reveals less than 0.001% chance of organic MYX trading activity; Rena Labs suspects market manipulation.
data.description: Representatives from Rena Labs informed Cointelegraph that recent trading activity on the MYX platform indicates a high likelihood of market manipulation.

data.title: Five Point announces pricing for tender offer for 10.500% Senior Notes due 2028. Amount unspecified.
data.description: Five Point Holdings, LLC announced today the pricing details of a cash tender offer to buy all outstanding 10.500% Initial Rate Senior Notes due 2028. The offer is for the Notes co-issued by Five Point Operating Company, LP and Five Point Capital Corp. The Offerors are making the Offer, and it is in compliance with an Off.

data.title: Skywork.ai launches AI Office Suite for industries, focusing on depth, accuracy, and business impact. Globally launched in May 2025.
data.description: Skywork.ai, a groundbreaking company, has introduced the world's first AI Office Suite, designed for depth, accuracy, and business impact. This innovative suite was launched worldwide in May 2025, aiming to revolutionize industries in an era where speed is no longer sufficient.

data.title: Tevogen praises HHS for tackling Long COVID, highlights TVGN 489’s possible impact on 20M Americans, thanks the administration.
data.description: Today, in Warren, N.J., Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: TVGN) showed appreciation to the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) and Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. for organizing two Long COVID roundtables. These discussions, led by the Trump Administration, spotlighted patient experiences and ongoing research efforts.

data.title: Former Disney CEO supports Jimmy Kimmel after FCC suspends show for Charlie Kirk remarks. Accuses FCC of intimidation tactics. full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Former CEO of the Walt Disney Co., Michael Eisner, has expressed his support for Jimmy Kimmel following ABC's indefinite suspension of his late-night show. The suspension was triggered by remarks Kimmel made about the killing of Charlie Kirk. Eisner's statement, reported by CNBC on Friday, criticized FCC Chairman Brendan Carr for employing what he deemed as "out-of-control intimidation" towards Disney and ABC before the decision to pull "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" from the air on Wednesday night. More information is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dallas-based co-warehousing company Polygon opens a 55,000-square-foot warehouse in Dallas, TX, its second location.
data.description: In the city of Dallas, on September 19, 2025, Polygon, a co-warehousing firm, famous for providing convenient and adaptable warehouse spaces, unveiled a new facility spanning 55,000 square feet. This establishment in Dallas, TX is Polygon's second site, with the initial one having been launched in Atlanta.

data.title: First Horizon recognized again as one of America's Best Midsize Companies in 2025 by TIME. Memphis-based regional banking leader, listed on NYSE: FHN.
data.description: A regional banking leader based in Memphis, First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN or "First Horizon"), has been honored on TIME's 2025 list of America's Best Midsize Companies, marking its second consecutive year of recognition. The announcement was made on September 19, 2025, signifying the company's continued success and prominence in the industry.

data.title: GitHub has integrated Copilot coding agent into Microsoft Teams for developers to collaborate effectively.
data.description: A recent development from GitHub involves the introduction of a new feature that permits developers to utilize the Copilot coding agent within Microsoft Teams for improved collaborative coding. This update is set to revolutionize teamwork within the coding community by providing seamless integration between GitHub and Microsoft Teams. The feature aims to enhance efficiency and streamline the coding process by directly incorporating Copilot into the popular collaboration platform. This innovation is expected to benefit a large number of developers by simplifying their coding tasks and accelerating the development process.

data.title: 14 Arnold & Itkin attorneys are recognized in 2025 Texas Super Lawyers & Rising Stars; 9 named Super Lawyers.
data.description: In Houston on September 19, 2025, the legal firm Arnold & Itkin LLP, situated in Houston, specializing in personal injury cases, received recognition in the 2025 edition of Texas Super Lawyers® and Super Lawyers® Rising Stars™ from Thomson Reuters. A total of 14 attorneys from Arnold & Itkin were acknowledged, with nine of them selected for the Super Lawyers designation.

data.title: Aspen Power acquired 6.85 MW solar projects in Pennsylvania, expanding their clean energy portfolio.
data.description: In a recent update on September 9, 2025, Aspen Power has expanded its Pennsylvania portfolio with the acquisition of new solar projects. The company has closed a deal with Syncarpha for sites totaling 6.85 MW. Aspen Power, known for its focus on distributed generation and commitment to advancing clean energy initiatives, finalized the acquisition to further bolster its presence in the region.

data.title: AOFAS Annual Meeting 2025 in SCHAUMBURG, Ill. attracted 1,100+ attendees, focusing on advancements in orthopaedics.
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois on September 19, 2025, over 1,100 individuals including foot and ankle orthopaedic surgeons, advanced health practitioners, orthopaedic residents, and medical students gathered at the American Orthopaedic Foot & Ankle Society event. They came together to recognize leaders in the field who have made significant contributions to foot and ankle orthopaedics.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market on a dip with Bitcoin at $115,346.95, Ethereum $4,461.67, XRP $3.00, Dogecoin $0.2656. 120,795 traders liquidated for $321.54M. Laos exploring crypto mining.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets experienced a downturn on Friday, wiping out all gains made after FOMC. Prices for select cryptocurrencies are: Bitcoin at $115,346.95, Ethereum at $4,461.67, Solana at $237.58, XRP at $3.00, Dogecoin at $0.2656, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001287. In the past 24 hours, Coinglass data reveals 120,795 traders were liquidated, resulting in a total loss of $321.54 million. Leading losers in the same period include MYX Finance, Fartcoin, and SPX6900. In other news, Laos is considering using excess hydropower for crypto mining to address debt issues. data.title: Fed cuts benchmark interest rate to 4.00%-4.25% after Trump pressure. 4th cut in easing cycle, signaling possible further cuts. Job gains slowed with only 22,000 new jobs in August. Unemployment remains low.
data.description: The Federal Reserve has cut its benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points to 4.00%-4.25%, marking the fourth cut in the current easing cycle. This decision, influenced by President Trump's pressure, ends a nine-month policy pause, with policymakers hinting at further easing. Job gains have slowed, with the August nonfarm payrolls report showing only 22,000 new jobs created, a significant drop from July's 79,000. The average monthly job gain over the last three months has fallen to 29,000, indicating stagnation in employment trends. Despite not being a unanimous decision, this move is aimed at addressing the weakening job market and signals potential future rate cuts.
